## Pre-Flight Checks
- [ ] **CTA/Link checks:** All primary CTAs point to the correct URL (https://chatgpt.com/g/g-6a3cac9b87f08191af3f98ab42ad55ae-smb-ai-workflow-agent-builder).
- [ ] **SEO checks:** Canonical URLs, open graph tags, JSON-LD, and meta tags are present and correct. Only absolute URLs for `og:url` and `og:image`.
- [ ] **Accessibility checks:** Semantic HTML used, alt attributes on images, visible focus states, adequate contrast.
- [ ] **Mobile checks:** Page layout is responsive and tested on mobile viewpoints.
- [ ] **Embed checks:** (If applicable) Embed configurations do not break.
- [ ] **Disclaimer checks:** Sensitive workflows have the required disclaimer visible.
- [ ] **No fake claims/proof:** No fake testimonials, logos, ratings, or unsupported compliance claims have been added. No prohibited buzzwords.
- [ ] **Secrets:** No API keys, tokens, or secrets have been hardcoded.
